ogTitle: Avenue Range vs Avoca Dell: Climate Safety

heading: Avenue Range vs Avoca Dell — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Avenue Range, South Australia and Avoca Dell, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Avenue Range and Avoca Dell have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Avenue Range or Avoca Dell safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Avenue Range has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Avoca Dell scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Avenue Range scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Avoca Dell scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Avenue Range or Avoca Dell?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Avenue Range has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
